issues.detail: The instructions do not fully cover all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Sprint planning transcript to structured summary
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a freeform bullet summary missing the SKILL's required structure; treatment uses the exact template — Meeting Summary heading, Discussion Summary grouped by topic, and an Action Items markdown table with Task/Owner/Deadline/Priority columns.

scenarios.name: Action items only, flag unassigned
scenarios.rationale: Baseline emits a flat checklist and lumps owner-less tasks in with the rest; treatment uses the SKILL Example-2 layout of a Task/Owner/Deadline/Status table followed by a separate Unassigned items section.
